title: conyza viguieri
intro: Conyza viguieri, also known as False Flax or Viguiera, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known for their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Conyza viguieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to support digestive health and immune system function.
